use_case: CRUD operations list detail create update delete
implementation_notes: TanStack Query useQuery useMutation cache invalidation optimistic updates
anti_patterns: Using useEffect + fetch without caching no error handling no retry logic

use_case: Simple read-heavy dashboards real-time polling lightweight caching
implementation_notes: SWR useSWR auto-revalidation deduping polling interval
anti_patterns: Using raw fetch without caching no revalidation strategy

use_case: Complex nested data relationships multiple entities in one query
implementation_notes: Apollo Client useQuery useMutation cache normalization type policies
anti_patterns: Over-fetching with REST when GraphQL available no fragment colocation

use_case: Modern React apps with GraphQL preferring TanStack ecosystem
implementation_notes: graphql-request + TanStack Query manual cache key management
anti_patterns: Using Apollo just for GraphQL when simpler solutions exist

use_case: Real-time chat notifications live updates low latency
implementation_notes: Native WebSocket API with reconnect logic heartbeat ping-pong
anti_patterns: No reconnect logic no heartbeat memory leaks from unclosed connections

use_case: Real-time bidirectional events rooms namespaces fallback support
implementation_notes: Socket.io client with auto-reconnect room management event namespacing
anti_patterns: Using raw WebSocket when Socket.io features needed no room management

use_case: Spring Boot backend enterprise messaging topic subscription
implementation_notes: SockJS + STOMP.js subscribe to topics send to destinations ack/nack
anti_patterns: Using raw WebSocket with Spring STOMP no topic subscription no heart-beat

use_case: One-way server push live dashboards stock prices notifications
implementation_notes: EventSource with reconnect polyfill for Edge custom headers handling
anti_patterns: Using WebSocket for one-way data no reconnect for EventSource

use_case: High-performance internal services microservices protobuf contracts
implementation_notes: gRPC-Web client protobuf code generation streaming support
anti_patterns: Using REST for internal microservices when gRPC available

implementation_notes: MSW browser + server worker mock REST GraphQL TanStack Query devtools
anti_patterns: Hardcoding mock data in components no MSW setup using setTimeout fake delays

use_case: Full fake REST API for rapid prototyping zero backend setup
implementation_notes: json-server with custom routes middleware db.json seed data
anti_patterns: Keeping json-server in production using it for real data no migration path

use_case: Simple persistence offline-first demo data no backend dependency
implementation_notes: localStorage sessionStorage with schema validation hydration sync

implementation_notes: OpenAPI Generator typescript-axios or typescript-fetch runtime validation

use_case: End-to-end type-safe APIs with tRPC router zero schema duplication
